John Smith
Senior Backend Engineer

Experience:
Senior Backend Engineer at Acme Corp, Jan 2021 to present.
Built distributed payment services in Python and Go. Reduced p99 latency by 40% in Q3 2023.

Backend Engineer at Globex Inc, Jun 2018 to Dec 2020.
Designed REST APIs in Node.js for the recommendation engine.

Education:
BSc Computer Science, MIT, 2014-2018.

Skills: Python, Go, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis.
